race.comment: ZORRO'S FLIGHT (5) has come back well. He just missed first up but went on with it last time at Sale when a determined winner over this trip. Imagine there'll be a bit more improvement to come for a yard that can keep them deep into a campaign and he maps for every hope with the 3kg claimer aboard. FLYING MIKKI (1) is racing well for this, trying hard in town at Sandown Lakeside last start when third. He draws to sit a bit closer here and should be right there. PUGLIA (9) resumes. She was racing well last time in and has always promised a bit - look for a market push. CROSSOVERKID (11) resumes. His fresh run last time in at Cranbourne was good and he can be hitting the line. THE NARRATOR (2) struggled in town last time but is better suited here.
